title: T-025 — Playwright E2E + seed fixtures: OEE-001/002/003 happy path with role gates (15-OEE-f)
prompt:
# T-025 — Playwright E2E + seed fixtures

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §10.1/10.2/10.3 (3 P1 dashboards), §11 V-OEE-ACCESS, §15.1; Wave1 T-123 Playwright primitive
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Wave1 T-123 Playwright primitive consumer: end-to-end browser test covering the OEE-001/002/003 happy path with three role personas (oee_viewer, oee_supervisor, oee_admin) + seed fixtures for a single tenant with 3 lines × 7 days × 3 shifts of seeded oee_snapshots + downtime_events + changeover_events. Captures screenshot artifacts per page per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Pre-flight
All P1 UI tasks (T-014..T-022) and API tasks (T-011..T-013) must be merged. Verify Wave1 T-123 Playwright base config + auth fixture.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/e2e/oee/_fixtures/seed-oee.ts`: idempotent seeder writing 1 tenant + 3 lines + shift_configs (AM/PM/Night) + 7 days × 3 shifts × 480 oee_snapshots/shift + 50 downtime_events + 10 changeover_events + oee_alert_thresholds tenant default. Run before each spec.
2. `apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-001-line-trend.spec.ts`: navigate to /oee/line/LINE-01 as oee_viewer; assert 4 ArcGauges + Trend chart visible; switch window 1h/6h/24h; capture screenshot.
3. `apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-002-heatmap.spec.ts`: navigate to /oee/heatmap as oee_viewer; assert 3×7=21 cells visible for 3 lines; click cell → cell_drill_modal opens; capture screenshot.
4. `apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-003-summary.spec.ts`: navigate to /oee/summary as oee_supervisor; assert 5 KPI cards + 3 tabs; switch to Six Big Losses tab and verify Pareto chart visible; capture screenshot.
5. `apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-admin-rbac.spec.ts`: as oee_viewer, navigate to /oee/settings → expect redirect to /oee; as oee_admin, navigate → expect page renders; assert middleware role gate.
6. CI integration via Wave1 T-122 primitive (playwright job wired into pnpm e2e:ci) — no new CI infra here.

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/oee/_fixtures/seed-oee.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-001-line-trend.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-002-heatmap.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-003-summary.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/oee/oee-admin-rbac.spec.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the seeder runs against a fresh DB, when oee_snapshots is queried, then exactly 1 tenant × 3 lines × 7 days × 3 shifts × 480 = 30,240 snapshot rows are present and the seeder is idempotent.
2. Given an oee_viewer session, when /oee/line/LINE-01 is opened with window=24h, then 4 ArcGauges (A/P/Q/OEE) are visible, the Trend chart renders, and a screenshot artifact is captured.
3. Given an oee_viewer session navigates to /oee/settings, when Playwright follows redirects, then the final URL is /oee (V-OEE-ACCESS-2 middleware gate); given oee_admin session, the URL stays /oee/settings.
4. Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then all four spec files produce screenshot + Playwright trace artifacts attached per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright primitive is unavailable, the task documents the blocker and falls back to RTL parity smoke tests.

## Test strategy
- RED: write all 4 spec files + seeder asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web e2e:ci -- oee`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip seed idempotency — repeated CI runs must not duplicate rows.
- Do not paste prototype JSX-aware selectors — use accessible labels / role queries (Playwright getByRole/getByText).
- Do not bypass Wave1 T-123 Playwright config / T-122 CI primitive — reuse existing harness.
- Do not gate the E2E on backend services not implemented in 15-OEE (mock 12-REPORTING export if needed).
- Do not include flaky time-of-day assertions — use fake-time helpers if needed.

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright E2E across OEE-001/002/003 + admin RBAC gate + 30k-row seed fixture; uses Wave1 T-123 primitive; captures parity screenshots.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Closes Auditor A's missing E2E coverage for 15-OEE. Seeder idempotent (re-run safe in CI). Three role personas reuse Wave1 auth fixture. Wave1 T-122 CI primitive runs the e2e:ci job; this task does not add CI infrastructure.

Additional acceptance detail: all 4 spec files produce screenshot + Playwright trace artifacts per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.
out_of_scope: Multi-tenant E2E (single tenant fixture in P1)
acceptance_criteria: Given the seeder runs against a fresh DB, when oee_snapshots is queried, then exactly 1 tenant × 3 lines × 7 days × 3 shifts × 480 = 30,240 snapshot rows are present; re-running the seeder leaves the row count unchanged (idempotent)
Given an oee_viewer session, when /oee/line/LINE-01 is opened with window=24h, then 4 ArcGauges (A/P/Q/OEE) are visible, the Trend chart renders, and a screenshot artifact is captured

Given an oee_viewer session navigates to /oee/settings, when Playwright follows redirects, then the final URL is /oee (V-OEE-ACCESS-2 middleware gate); given oee_admin session, the URL stays /oee/settings

Given the task is closed out, when reviewers inspect evidence, then all four spec files produce screenshot + Playwright trace artifacts per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright primitive is unavailable, the task documents the blocker and falls back to RTL parity smoke tests
test_strategy: RED: write 4 spec files + seeder asserting four ACs
Capture screenshots and Playwright trace per spec; attach artifact paths in closeout
risk_red_lines: Do not paste prototype JSX-aware selectors — use getByRole/getByText
Do not bypass Wave1 T-123 / T-122 primitives
Do not gate E2E on un-implemented backend (mock 12-REPORTING export)
Do not include flaky time-of-day assertions
